title: Hilyat Talib al-'Ilm — Part 1: Introduction
description: Part 1 of the explanation of 'Hilyat Talib al-'Ilm' (The Adornment of the Knowledge Seeker) by Shaykh Bakr Abu Zayd — a classic manual on the manners, ethics and discipline of the student of sacred knowledge. This opening session sets out the aims of the book and the dignity of seeking knowledge.
speaker: Unknown Speaker
